summary_en: Corrected disclosure of FY3/27 earnings guidance and capital-cost and stock-price-conscious management targets (May 2026 update). Filing issued as technical correction to prior May 13, 2026 announcement following adjustments to FY3/26 results.
title_en: (Corrected) 'FY3/27 Earnings Forecast, FY3/26 Results Summary, and Response to Capital-Cost and Stock-Price-Conscious Management (May 2026 Update) – Partial Corrections'
translation_en_brief: Tokyo Printing Ink Mfg. Co., Ltd. issued a corrected version of its capital-cost and stock-price-conscious management (COC) update on May 22, 2026. This filing corrects technical errors in the prior May 13, 2026 announcement. The corrections stem from adjustments made to FY3/26 (year ended March 2026) financial results announced in the same earnings release. The full corrected text with all revisions underlined is provided in the detailed attachment. Specific COC targets (ROE, operating margin, payout ratios, or other metrics) and their revised levels are contained in the corrected document. The company reaffirms its commitment to managing with explicit awareness of capital costs and stock price performance.
